gist.headline: Fresh off the forge
gist.blurb: StickerForge has officially joined the community showcase. Turn your wildest text prompts into custom stickers for Telegram and WhatsApp without breaking a sweat.
gist.summary: Added StickerForge to the community apps directory, a new tool for generating custom AI stickers from text or images.
gist.impact: Creators can now easily discover StickerForge to build personalized sticker packs for their favorite messaging apps.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about 'StickerForge', an app for creating chat stickers. Visuals should combine a 'forge' or crafting element with stickers and chat apps. Polly the bee acting as a crafter, peeling a fresh sticker off a cute anvil, while the Monitor Robot holds a phone showing chat bubbles.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny blacksmith apron, peeling a freshly printed, glowing pixel sticker off a small anvil. A chunky retro robot companion with a monitor head stands nearby, holding up a smartphone displaying colorful chat bubbles. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
